name: @pbx-stratos/watch-code
description: Watch-scope live trading bot runner + dashboard server. Imports from @pbx-stratos/kernel + @pbx-stratos/scout-code (strategies).

scripts.//server: Runs the dashboard + bot server with hot reload. SAFETY + behaviour notes copied from the pre-restructure bots/package.json: it watches LOCAL files only, no git pull, no network, no new endpoint, so it adds no attack surface. A restart is safe in operation too: orchestrator.resumeAll() relaunches running bots from their sticky desiredRunning intent (same path that survives a redeploy). Dashboard html/css/js are re-read per request, so UI edits show on a plain browser refresh even between restarts.
